Bash(sleep 3; rm -rf "D:/jiangweipeng/trae_code/file_analyzer/dist" "D:/jiangweipeng/trae_code/file_analyzer/build" 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; cd "D:/jiangweipeng/trae_code/file_analyzer" && C:/Users/Administrator/miniconda3/envs/file_analyzer/python.exe -m PyInstaller "文件分析管理器.spec" --clean -y 2>&1 | tail -20)

Bash(cat > "D:/jiangweipeng/trae_code/file_analyzer/build.bat" << 'ENDOFFILE'
@echo off
chcp 936 >nul
title Build Script

echo ============================================================
echo           File Analyzer - Build Script
echo ============================================================
echo.

cd /d "%~dp0"

set PYTHON_EXE=C:\\Users\\Administrator\\miniconda3\\envs\\file_analyzer\\python.exe

echo [1/4] Checking Python...
"%PYTHON_EXE%" --version
if errorlevel 1 \(
    echo [ERROR] Python not found
    goto :end
\)
echo.

echo [2/4] Cleaning old files...
if exist "build" \(
    rmdir /s /q "build" 2>nul
    echo       Deleted build
\)
if exist "dist" \(
    rmdir /s /q "dist" 2>nul
    echo       Deleted dist
\)
echo.

echo [3/4] Building... Please wait...
echo.
"%PYTHON_EXE%" -m PyInstaller "文件分析管理器.spec" --clean -y
if errorlevel 1 \(
    echo.
    echo [ERROR] Build failed!
    goto :end
\)

echo.
echo [4/4] Build completed!
echo.
echo ============================================================
echo Output: %~dp0dist\\文件分析管理器
echo ============================================================

:end
echo.
pause
ENDOFFILE)
